documents.title: Idempotent financial writes
documents.content: Financial write endpoints should require an idempotency key, persist request hash, and return the original response for retried keys with the same payload.

documents.title: Audit evidence chain
documents.content: Every regulated requirement should map to tests and release evidence. Audit events should include actor, action, timestamp, correlation_id, and outcome.

documents.title: PII-safe logging
documents.content: Logs must avoid raw personal identifiers. Use central redaction, field allowlists, and explicit data retention windows per tenant policy.
